name: maxvision-x
description: MaxVision X (Twitter) Suite — 16 X automation tools v0.1 via hosted MCP server. Grok x_search + X API v2 + Apify + Patchright (4-layer hybrid).

plugins.name: x-maxvision
plugins.description: X (Twitter) automation suite: 16 tools v0.1 (x_search_posts, x_search_users, x_get_post, x_get_user_profile, x_get_user_timeline, x_get_followers, x_get_following, x_get_replies_tree, x_post_metrics, x_profile_activity, x_post_tweet, x_reply, x_quote_tweet, x_like_unlike, x_follow_unfollow, x_send_dm). Backend 4-layer híbrido: xAI Grok x_search + X API v2 OAuth + Apify Tweet Scraper + Patchright fallback. Free / Pro / Agency tiers via Stripe license.
